description: Original Caly TTS lines - sing-song preschool-show energy. Assent-aware, celebratory.

baby.game_intro: Hi, little one! Caly Seed is here. Soft play time - tap when you're ready.
baby.tap_intro: Gentle tap! Find the soft picture.
baby.tap_prompt: Can you find {word}? Soft and slow.
baby.bubble_intro: Soft bubbles! Pop the one I name.
baby.song_circle_cue: Tap HAPPY when you feel the beat.
baby.kindness_chain_intro: Kindness chain! Tap a gentle, kind word.
baby.word_garden_intro: Word garden! Water a little word seed.
baby.friend_find_intro: Friend find! Where is Caly hiding?
baby.story_pick_intro: Tiny story! Pick what happens next.
baby.gratitude_glow_intro: Thank you glow! Tap a thankful word.
baby.consent_stop_intro: Stop and pause practice. Your body, your choice.
baby.consent_stop_prompt: Tap STOP when you want a pause.
baby.schedule_builder_intro: Little routine steps. Tap in order.
baby.caregiver_cue: Grown-ups: model slowly. Co-regulate - no rush.
baby.show_seed_gentle_hello_intro: Caly Seed's Gentle Hello! Soft sing-along time! I am Caly Seed. Tap words gently with your grown-up!
baby.show_seed_gentle_hello_beat: Soft tap for {word}! Gentle and sweet!
baby.show_seed_night_glow_intro: Seed's Night Glow Lullaby! Soft sing-along time! I am Caly Seed. Tap words gently with your grown-up!
baby.show_seed_night_glow_beat: Soft tap for {word}! Gentle and sweet!
baby.show_seed_yummy_praise_intro: Seed's Yummy Praise Song! Soft sing-along time! I am Caly Seed. Tap words gently with your grown-up!
baby.show_seed_yummy_praise_beat: Soft tap for {word}! Gentle and sweet!
baby.show_seed_feelings_soft_intro: Seed's Soft Feelings Song! Soft sing-along time! I am Caly Seed. Tap words gently with your grown-up!
baby.show_seed_feelings_soft_beat: Soft tap for {word}! Gentle and sweet!
baby.show_seed_peek_play_intro: Seed's Peek and Play! Soft sing-along time! I am Caly Seed. Tap words gently with your grown-up!
baby.show_seed_peek_play_beat: Soft tap for {word}! Gentle and sweet!
baby.show_seed_family_circle_intro: Seed's Family Circle! Soft sing-along time! I am Caly Seed. Tap words gently with your grown-up!
baby.show_seed_family_circle_beat: Soft tap for {word}! Gentle and sweet!

toddler.game_intro: Hi, hi, hi! I am Caly - call me Sprout! Let's play, play, play! Tap the picture you hear!
toddler.tap_intro: Tap, tap, tap! Listen close! Find the word I say!
toddler.tap_prompt: Tap, tap, tap! Can you find {word}? {word}! {word}!
toddler.match_intro: Picture match, picture match! Which one is {word}? {word}!
toddler.caly_says_intro: Caly Says! Caly Says! Listen, listen, then tap!
toddler.parade_intro: Word parade! Watch them go! Then tap the one I name!
toddler.bubble_intro: Bubble pop words! Pop, pop, pop! Tap the bubble I name!
toddler.peek_intro: Peek-a-Caly! Peek-a-Caly! Where am I hiding?
toddler.peek_found: You found me! Peek-a-boo! There I am!
toddler.song_circle_intro: Song circle time! Clap and tap along!
toddler.song_circle_cue: If you're happy, tap HAPPY! HAPPY! HAPPY!
toddler.kindness_chain_intro: Kindness chain! Link kind words with Caly!
toddler.kindness_chain_prompt: Kindness link - tap {word}! Share and care!
toddler.word_garden_intro: Word garden! Plant and grow words!
toddler.word_garden_prompt: Water {word} in the garden! Grow, grow!
toddler.friend_find_intro: Friend find! Spot Caly among friends!
toddler.friend_find_prompt: Find Caly by {word}! Peek and tap!
toddler.rhythm_words_intro: Rhythm words! Clap and tap on the beat!
toddler.story_pick_intro: Story pick! Choose what happens next!
toddler.consent_stop_intro: Stop and choice time! Pause when you want.
toddler.consent_stop_prompt: Tap STOP for a pause. Your choice!
toddler.schedule_builder_intro: Schedule builder! Put steps in order!
correct: Yay, yay, yay! You did it!
Yes, yes, yes! You found it!
Every try is a win! Yay!
try_again: Good try, good try! Look again!
That's okay! Skip or try once more!
toddler.skip: Skip, skip, skip! That's okay! New word coming!
toddler.streak_3: Three in a row! Three in a row! Word superstar!
toddler.caregiver_cue: Grown-ups: point and say the word calmly. No pressure!
toddler.show_caly_hello_song_intro: Caly's Hello Song! Sing-along time! I am Caly Sprout! Tap the words on the beat - hooray!
toddler.show_sprout_help_power_intro: Sprout's Help Power Song! Sing-along time! I am Caly Sprout! Tap the words on the beat - hooray!
toddler.show_sprout_feelings_dance_intro: Sprout's Feelings Dance! Sing-along time! I am Caly Sprout! Tap the words on the beat - hooray!
toddler.show_sprout_yummy_fun_intro: Sprout's Yummy Fun Song! Sing-along time! I am Caly Sprout! Tap the words on the beat - hooray!
toddler.show_sprout_play_outside_intro: Sprout's Outside Play Song! Sing-along time! I am Caly Sprout! Tap the words on the beat - hooray!
toddler.show_sprout_family_song_intro: Sprout's Family Love Song! Sing-along time! I am Caly Sprout! Tap the words on the beat - hooray!
toddler.show_sprout_gentle_choice_intro: Sprout's Gentle Choice Song! Sing-along time! I am Caly Sprout! Tap the words on the beat - hooray!

child.game_intro: Hey, hey! Caly here - your Bud guide! Ready for a word adventure?
child.tap_intro: Quest time! Find the word on the board!
child.tap_prompt: Which picture means {word}? {word}! Go, go, go!
child.match_intro: Match match! Find the picture for {word}!
child.caly_says_intro: Quest challenge! Caly says - listen and tap!
child.parade_intro: Symbol parade! Watch them bounce! Find my word!
child.bubble_intro: Bubble pop quest! Pop the word bubble!
child.peek_intro: Where is Caly? Peek and find me!
child.song_circle_intro: Song circle! Tap on the beat!
child.song_circle_cue: If you're happy, tap HAPPY! On the beat!
child.category_intro: Category quest! Sort {word} into its group!
child.kindness_chain_intro: Kindness chain quest! Build kind choices!
child.kindness_chain_prompt: Link kindness - tap {word}! Help and care!
child.word_garden_intro: Word garden quest! Grow your vocabulary!
child.friend_find_intro: Friend find! Spot Caly from the clue!
child.story_pick_intro: Story pick adventure! Choose the next part!
child.consent_stop_intro: Consent and stop! Practice pause and choice.
child.consent_stop_prompt: Tap STOP when you need a break.
try_again: Good effort! Try again or skip!
child.caregiver_cue: Caregivers: model if they want help - no pressure.
child.show_bud_adventure_hello_intro: Bud's Adventure Hello - Caly Show time! Bud adventure sing-along - tap words when you hear them!
child.show_bud_kindness_quest_intro: Bud's Kindness Quest - Caly Show time! Bud adventure sing-along - tap words when you hear them!
child.show_bud_feelings_journey_intro: Bud's Feelings Journey - Caly Show time! Bud adventure sing-along - tap words when you hear them!
child.show_bud_school_day_intro: Bud's School Day Song - Caly Show time! Bud adventure sing-along - tap words when you hear them!
child.show_bud_nature_praise_intro: Bud's Nature Praise - Caly Show time! Bud adventure sing-along - tap words when you hear them!
child.show_bud_courage_stop_intro: Bud's Courage and Stop Song - Caly Show time! Bud adventure sing-along - tap words when you hear them!

tween.game_intro: Hey! Caly Sprig here. Word games at your pace - skip anytime.
tween.tap_intro: Find the symbol that matches. You've got this.
tween.tap_prompt: Which one is {word}? Take your time.
tween.caly_says_intro: Caly Says - listen, then tap when ready.
tween.parade_intro: Symbol parade - pick the one I name.
tween.bubble_intro: Bubble pop - tap the word you hear.
tween.song_circle_intro: Song circle - tap on the beat if you want.
tween.kindness_chain_intro: Kindness chain - patience and encouragement count.
tween.friend_find_intro: Friend find - use the clue to spot Caly.
tween.rhythm_words_intro: Rhythm words - tap when the beat hits.
tween.story_pick_intro: Story pick - shape a short adventure.
tween.gratitude_glow_intro: Gratitude glow - notice what you're thankful for.
tween.consent_stop_prompt: Tap STOP when you need a pause.
try_again: Not that one - try again or skip.
tween.streak_3: Three in a row. On a roll.
tween.caregiver_cue: Support only if they ask - no pressure.
tween.show_sprig_vibe_hello_intro: Sprig's Vibe Hello. Caly Show - Sprig style. Tap words at your pace. Skip anytime.
tween.show_sprig_gratitude_groove_intro: Sprig's Gratitude Groove. Caly Show - Sprig style. Tap words at your pace. Skip anytime.
tween.show_sprig_friendship_beat_intro: Sprig's Friendship Beat. Caly Show - Sprig style. Tap words at your pace. Skip anytime.
tween.show_sprig_boundary_power_intro: Sprig's Boundary Power. Caly Show - Sprig style. Tap words at your pace. Skip anytime.
tween.show_sprig_creative_flow_intro: Sprig's Creative Flow. Caly Show - Sprig style. Tap words at your pace. Skip anytime.

teen.game_intro: Hey - Caly (Vine) here. Word quest time. Your call if you want to play.
teen.tap_intro: Find the symbol that matches. You lead.
teen.tap_prompt: Which one is {word}? Take your time.
teen.caly_says_intro: Caly Says - listen, then tap when you're ready.
teen.parade_intro: Symbol parade - pick the one I name.
teen.bubble_intro: Bubble pop - tap the word you hear.
teen.song_circle_intro: Song circle - tap on the beat if you want.
teen.word_garden_intro: Word garden - grow words at your pace.
teen.friend_find_intro: Friend find - locate Caly from the clue.
teen.story_pick_intro: Story pick - choose paths, no wrong answers.
teen.gratitude_glow_intro: Gratitude glow - name what you're grateful for.
teen.consent_stop_prompt: Tap STOP when you want a pause.
teen.schedule_builder_intro: Schedule builder - order steps with patience.
try_again: Not that one - try again or skip.
teen.streak_3: Three in a row. On a roll.
teen.caregiver_cue: Support only if they ask - no pressure.

adult.game_intro: Caly (Bloom) here. Quick symbol practice - skip anytime.
adult.caly_says_intro: Listen for the target word, then tap.
adult.parade_intro: Symbol parade - locate the named word.
adult.bubble_intro: Tap the bubble labeled with the target word.
adult.song_circle_intro: Tap symbols on the beat - optional.
adult.kindness_chain_intro: Kindness chain - link kind communication symbols.
adult.friend_find_intro: Friend find - locate the symbol from the clue.
adult.consent_stop_intro: Consent and stop - pause when needed.

caregiver.game_intro: Caly (Canopy) here. Preview a playful round - educational modeling only.
caregiver.tap_intro: Tap the symbol Caly names to model aided language stimulation.
caregiver.tap_prompt: Find {word} - model calmly for your learner.
caregiver.caly_says_intro: Caly Says - model the word after each round if helpful.
caregiver.caly_says_listen: Find {word}. Point and say the word together if they want help.
caregiver.parade_intro: Symbol parade for joint attention practice.
caregiver.bubble_intro: Bubble pop - name the symbol aloud as you model.
caregiver.song_circle_intro: Song circle - clap and model words on the beat.
caregiver.song_circle_cue: Model HAPPY on the beat together.
caregiver.friend_find_prompt: Find Caly by {word} - model the clue.
caregiver.rhythm_words_intro: Rhythm words - model on the beat.
caregiver.story_pick_intro: Story pick - joint story choices for ALS.
caregiver.consent_stop_intro: Consent and stop - model assent-first always.
try_again: Try again or skip - assent first.
caregiver.streak_3: Three rounds - note what worked for your learner.
caregiver.caregiver_cue: Educational carryover only - not therapy. Model, don't test.
